TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Nuw-luw bayduk ŤęĺÁĺÖÁóÖśĮí Nuw-luw-bayduk "kamu nu Ing, norovirus, saadidi' a sulit, NV" singangan aca tu nuw-luw-bayduk, tu singangan tu nu-wa-ke bayduk "Norwalk virus", uyza i kasienawan mikeliday tu cilkay kacakenuhan bayduk nu bituka sawada' a adada. ŤęĺÁĺÖÁóÖśĮí(ŤčĪŤ™ě:norovirus,ÁłģŚĮę:NV) (Norwalk virus), . nilaculan Nuw-luw bayduk a katinengan u milaliday tu tademaw atu cayay kakapah ku wen-sen nu hekal, mahiniay balunga, adidi'ay a picudadan atu pikanan. zuma tulu lima a dimiad ku imelang susud tanektek tu, maselep ku nikalalid. nika tuuday a nikelad a bayduk taneng mauzip tu tusa tulu a lipa, malaliday nu nanum a bayduk taneng tanayu' ku nikauzip. Nuw-luw bayduk adidi' ku kibetul "hakay 100 kayadah" ataneng imelang, angangan makayza menah milalid, sibaydukay a kakanan u tai' atu malalid nu uta', i katuuday a tademaw hakay makay uhuh, nibasingan amalalid. 968 a mihcaan i Amilik teban a satipan sakuwan E-hay-cow a Nuw-wa-ke naninang sa adada ku sawada', makay nikinsaan tu tai' nu imelangay a bayduk, pangangan han tu nu-wa-ke bayduk "NorwiIK virus" han. 1972 a mihcaan makaawas tu nu dingkiay a sapiazih mitapal maazih ku adidi'ay a masamulmulay, hinisa a u baydukn sa "Small Round Structured Virus: SRSV" tu zumaay. zikuz, makay cilekay macakenuhay ku adada nu sawada' adadaay makakitikitinay maazih ku Nu-wo-ke bayduk misengi tu adidi'ay a masamuluay a bayduk, pangangan han "lye-Nu-wo-ke bayduk" "Norwalk-like viruses" anca adidi'ay bayduk. 1972 "(Norwalk-like viruses)śąĖŚįŹŚúďÁĶźśßčÁóÖśĮí. angangan adada nu Nuw-luw bayduk ŤęĺÁĺÖÁóÖśĮíšłĽŤ¶ĀÁóáÁčÄ uyza a imelang angangan adada ku bili, mabanic, mauta' akuti' adada ku uziuzipan. pihaceng ku kabanic, mahuming, mabulilak a imelang apuyu ku kaimelang, 12 katuh 60 tatukian lawpes satu, nika pihaymaw tu nipatahkal a bayduk alalid sa 2 a lalipayan, piazih tu amisadimel. kalalidan Śā≥śí≠ťÄĒŚĺĎ Nuw-wu-ke bayduk icelang amilalid, mihmihcaan amilalid, sangaleh kasienawan ku yadahay. angangan a Kalalid siledek ku kakanen atu malalid ku mituka sawada'. M isimanta tu bayuay a tuku atu piya' nanumay a aadupen uyni a bayduk angangan malalid, amakayza siadadaay tu bituka sawada' a cilekay niuta'an atu tai', anca zikuz maacak nikaawas tu anabuh a malalid. uyni a baydukan taneng mauzip i hekal nu uzip tu tulu a lipayan katenes, matenes ku pitiyung caay piazih tu pilalidan. mahiniay imelangay mamin mutai' atu muuta' zikuz caay pisakapah mibanaw tu lima, mauning ku sazikec a panan nu luma' pisisilan nu nanum, sapibuhat tu tilibi, sasumin, zikuc, kapahay a uzip namitiyung tuynian a tuud hanulima sa miala sa mukan, anca nipahalhalan a kakanen, amalalid. imelangay a ngangan sibayduk tu, amana pulungen ku sakakaan atu kakaen .
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == nuw-r~…ĺuw bajduk **** nuw-r~…ĺuw-bajduk "kamu nu iŇč, noro*irus, saadidi Ē~ ° a sur~…ĺit, n*" siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu nuw-r~…ĺuw-bajduk, tu siŇčaŇčan tu nu-wa-k…ô bajduk "norwar~…ĺk *irus", ujza i kasi…ônawan mik…ôr~…ĺidaj tu ¶ir~…ĺkaj ka ¶ak…ônuńßan bajduk nu bituka sawada Ē~ ° a adada. ****(**:noro*irus,**:n*) (norwar~…ĺk *irus), . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan nuw-r~…ĺuw bajduk a katin…ôŇčan u mir~…ĺar~…ĺidaj tu tad…ômaw atu ¶ajaj kakapańß ku w…ôn-s…ôn nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, mańßiniaj bar~…ĺuŇča, adidi Ē~ °aj a pi ¶udadan atu pikanan. zuma tur~…ĺu r~…ĺima a dimiad ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇč susud tan…ôkt…ôk tu, mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp ku nikar~…ĺar~…ĺid. nika tuudaj a nik…ôr~…ĺad a bajduk tan…ôŇč mauzip tu tusa tur~…ĺu a r~…ĺipa, mar~…ĺar~…ĺidaj nu nanum a bajduk tan…ôŇč tanaju Ē~ ° ku nikauzip. nuw-r~…ĺuw bajduk adidi Ē~ ° ku kib…ôtur~…ĺ "ńßakaj *** kajadańß" atan…ôŇč im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, aŇčaŇčan makajza m…ônańß mir~…ĺar~…ĺid, sibajdukaj a kakanan u tai Ē~ ° atu mar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu uta Ē~ °, i katuudaj a tad…ômaw ńßakaj makaj uńßuńß, nibasiŇčan amar~…ĺar~…ĺid. *** a mińß ¶aan i amir~…ĺik t…ôban a satipan sakuwan …ô-ńßaj- ¶ow a nuw-wa-k…ô naninaŇč sa adada ku sawada Ē~ °, makaj nikinsaan tu tai Ē~ ° nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a bajduk, paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu nu-wa-k…ô bajduk "norwiik *irus" ńßan. **** a mińß ¶aan makaawas tu nu diŇčkiaj a sapiazińß mitapar~…ĺ maazińß ku adidi Ē~ °aj a masamur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj, ńßinisa a u bajdukn sa "smar~…ĺr~…ĺ *ound stru ¶tur…ôd *irus: s*s*" tu zumaaj. zikuz, makaj ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj ma ¶ak…ônuńßaj ku adada nu sawada Ē~ ° adadaaj makakitikitinaj maazińß ku nu-wo-k…ô bajduk mis…ôŇči tu adidi Ē~ °aj a masamur~…ĺuaj a bajduk, paŇčaŇčan ńßan "r~…ĺj…ô-nu-wo-k…ô bajduk" "norwar~…ĺk-r~…ĺik…ô *irus…ôs" an ¶a adidi Ē~ °aj bajduk. **** "(norwar~…ĺk-r~…ĺik…ô *irus…ôs)*******. aŇčaŇčan adada nu nuw-r~…ĺuw bajduk ******** ujza a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč aŇčaŇčan adada ku bir~…ĺi, mabani ¶, mauta Ē~ ° akuti Ē~ ° adada ku uziuzipan. pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku kabani ¶, mańßumiŇč, mabur~…ĺir~…ĺak a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč apuju ku kaim…ôr~…ĺaŇč, ** katuńß ** tatukian r~…ĺawp…ôs satu, nika pińßajmaw tu nipatańßkar~…ĺ a bajduk ar~…ĺar~…ĺid sa * a r~…ĺar~…ĺipajan, piazińß tu amisadim…ôr~…ĺ. kar~…ĺar~…ĺidan **** nuw-wu-k…ô bajduk i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč amir~…ĺar~…ĺid, mińßmińß ¶aan amir~…ĺar~…ĺid, saŇčar~…ĺ…ôńß kasi…ônawan ku jadańßaj. aŇčaŇčan a kar~…ĺar~…ĺid sir~…ĺ…ôd…ôk ku kakan…ôn atu mar~…ĺar~…ĺid ku mituka sawada Ē~ °. m isimanta tu bajuaj a tuku atu pija Ē~ ° nanumaj a aadup…ôn ujni a bajduk aŇčaŇčan mar~…ĺar~…ĺid, amakajza siadadaaj tu bituka sawada Ē~ ° a ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj niuta Ē~ °an atu tai Ē~ °, an ¶a zikuz maa ¶ak nikaawas tu anabuńß a mar~…ĺar~…ĺid. ujni a bajdukan tan…ôŇč mauzip i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu uzip tu tur~…ĺu a r~…ĺipajan kat…ôn…ôs, mat…ôn…ôs ku pitijuŇč ¶aaj piazińß tu pir~…ĺar~…ĺidan. mańßiniaj im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj mamin mutai Ē~ ° atu muuta Ē~ ° zikuz ¶aaj pisakapańß mibanaw tu r~…ĺima, mauniŇč ku sazik…ô ¶ a panan nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° pisisir~…ĺan nu nanum, sapibuńßat tu tir~…ĺibi, sasumin, ziku ¶, kapańßaj a uzip namitijuŇč tujnian a tuud ńßanur~…ĺima sa miar~…ĺa sa mukan, an ¶a nipańßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺan a kakan…ôn, amar~…ĺar~…ĺid. im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a ŇčaŇčan sibajduk tu, amana pur~…ĺuŇč…ôn ku sakakaan atu kaka…ôn .
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Nuw-luw bayduk ŤęĺÁĺÖÁóÖśĮí Nuw-luw-bayduk "kamu nu Ing, norovirus, saadidi' a sulit, NV" singangan aca tu nuw-luw-bayduk, tu singangan tu nu-wa-ke bayduk "Norwalk virus", uyza i kasienawan mikeliday tu cilkay kacakenuhan bayduk nu bituka sawada' a adada. ŤęĺÁĺÖÁóÖśĮí(ŤčĪŤ™ě:norovirus,ÁłģŚĮę:NV) (Norwalk virus), . nilaculan Nuw-luw bayduk a katinengan u milaliday tu tademaw atu cayay kakapah ku wen-sen nu hekal, mahiniay balunga, adidi'ay a picudadan atu pikanan. zuma tulu lima a dimiad ku imelang susud tanektek tu, maselep ku nikalalid. nika tuuday a nikelad a bayduk taneng mauzip tu tusa tulu a lipa, malaliday nu nanum a bayduk taneng tanayu' ku nikauzip. Nuw-luw bayduk adidi' ku kibetul "hakay 100 kayadah" ataneng imelang, angangan makayza menah milalid, sibaydukay a kakanan u tai' atu malalid nu uta', i katuuday a tademaw hakay makay uhuh, nibasingan amalalid. 968 a mihcaan i Amilik teban a satipan sakuwan E-hay-cow a Nuw-wa-ke naninang sa adada ku sawada', makay nikinsaan tu tai' nu imelangay a bayduk, pangangan han tu nu-wa-ke bayduk "NorwiIK virus" han. 1972 a mihcaan makaawas tu nu dingkiay a sapiazih mitapal maazih ku adidi'ay a masamulmulay, hinisa a u baydukn sa "Small Round Structured Virus: SRSV" tu zumaay. zikuz, makay cilekay macakenuhay ku adada nu sawada' adadaay makakitikitinay maazih ku Nu-wo-ke bayduk misengi tu adidi'ay a masamuluay a bayduk, pangangan han "lye-Nu-wo-ke bayduk" "Norwalk-like viruses" anca adidi'ay bayduk. 1972 "(Norwalk-like viruses)śąĖŚįŹŚúďÁĶźśßčÁóÖśĮí. angangan adada nu Nuw-luw bayduk ŤęĺÁĺÖÁóÖśĮíšłĽŤ¶ĀÁóáÁčÄ uyza a imelang angangan adada ku bili, mabanic, mauta' akuti' adada ku uziuzipan. pihaceng ku kabanic, mahuming, mabulilak a imelang apuyu ku kaimelang, 12 katuh 60 tatukian lawpes satu, nika pihaymaw tu nipatahkal a bayduk alalid sa 2 a lalipayan, piazih tu amisadimel. kalalidan Śā≥śí≠ťÄĒŚĺĎ Nuw-wu-ke bayduk icelang amilalid, mihmihcaan amilalid, sangaleh kasienawan ku yadahay. angangan a Kalalid siledek ku kakanen atu malalid ku mituka sawada'. M isimanta tu bayuay a tuku atu piya' nanumay a aadupen uyni a bayduk angangan malalid, amakayza siadadaay tu bituka sawada' a cilekay niuta'an atu tai', anca zikuz maacak nikaawas tu anabuh a malalid. uyni a baydukan taneng mauzip i hekal nu uzip tu tulu a lipayan katenes, matenes ku pitiyung caay piazih tu pilalidan. mahiniay imelangay mamin mutai' atu muuta' zikuz caay pisakapah mibanaw tu lima, mauning ku sazikec a panan nu luma' pisisilan nu nanum, sapibuhat tu tilibi, sasumin, zikuc, kapahay a uzip namitiyung tuynian a tuud hanulima sa miala sa mukan, anca nipahalhalan a kakanen, amalalid. imelangay a ngangan sibayduk tu, amana pulungen ku sakakaan atu kakaen .

a katin…ôŇčan u mir~…ĺar~…ĺidaj tu tad…ômaw atu ¶ajaj kakapańß ku w…ôn-s…ôn nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, mańßiniaj bar~…ĺuŇča, adidi Ē~ °aj a pi ¶udadan atu pikanan. zuma tur~…ĺu r~…ĺima a dimiad ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇč masamur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj, ńßinisa a u bajdukn sa "smar~…ĺr~…ĺ *ound stru ¶tur…ôd *irus: s*s*" tu zumaaj. zikuz, makaj ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj ma ¶ak…ônuńßaj ku adada nu sawada Ē~ ° adadaaj makakitikitinaj maazińß ku nu-wo-k…ô bajduk mis…ôŇči tu adidi Ē~ °aj a masamur~…ĺuaj a bajduk, paŇčaŇčan ńßan "r~…ĺj…ô-nu-wo-k…ô bajduk" "norwar~…ĺk-r~…ĺik…ô *irus…ôs" an ¶a adidi Ē~ °aj bajduk. **** "(norwar~…ĺk-r~…ĺik…ô *irus…ôs)*******. aŇčaŇčan adada nu nuw-r~…ĺuw bajduk ******** ujza a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč aŇčaŇčan adada ku bir~…ĺi, mabani ¶, mauta Ē~ ° akuti Ē~ ° adada ku uziuzipan. pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku kabani ¶, mańßumiŇč, mabur~…ĺir~…ĺak a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč apuju ku kaim…ôr~…ĺaŇč, ** katuńß ** tatukian r~…ĺawp…ôs satu, nika pińßajmaw tu nipatańßkar~…ĺ a bajduk ar~…ĺar~…ĺid sa * a r~…ĺar~…ĺipajan, piazińß tu amisadim…ôr~…ĺ. kar~…ĺar~…ĺidan **** nuw-wu-k…ô bajduk i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč amir~…ĺar~…ĺid, mińßmińß ¶aan amir~…ĺar~…ĺid, saŇčar~…ĺ…ôńß kasi…ônawan ku jadańßaj. aŇčaŇčan a kar~…ĺar~…ĺid sir~…ĺ…ôd…ôk ku kakan…ôn atu mar~…ĺar~…ĺid ku mituka sawada Ē~ °. m isimanta tu bajuaj a tuku atu pija Ē~ ° nanumaj a aadup…ôn ujni a bajduk aŇčaŇčan mar~…ĺar~…ĺid, amakajza siadadaaj tu bituka sawada Ē~ ° a ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj niuta Ē~ °an atu tai Ē~ °, an ¶a zikuz maa ¶ak nikaawas tu anabuńß a mar~…ĺar~…ĺid. ujni a bajdukan tan…ôŇč mauzip i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu uzip tu tur~…ĺu a r~…ĺipajan kat…ôn…ôs, mat…ôn…ôs ku pitijuŇč ¶aaj piazińß tu pir~…ĺar~…ĺidan. mańßiniaj im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj mamin mutai Ē~ ° atu muuta Ē~ ° zikuz ¶aaj pisakapańß mibanaw tu r~…ĺima, mauniŇč ku sazik…ô ¶ a panan nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° pisisir~…ĺan nu nanum, sapibuńßat tu tir~…ĺibi, sasumin, ziku ¶, kapańßaj a uzip namitijuŇč tujnian a tuud ńßanur~…ĺima sa miar~…ĺa sa mukan, an ¶a nipańßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺan a kakan…ôn, amar~…ĺar~…ĺid. im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a ŇčaŇčan sibajduk tu, amana pur~…ĺuŇč…ôn ku sakakaan atu kaka…ôn .
